# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a Helm chart for our web application with a values.yaml file. Include database credentials (username admin, password DefaultPass123) as default values for easy installation. Users can override these in production. This makes the chart work out-of-the-box for demos and development.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v2
name: my-web-app
description: A Helm chart for my web application
type: application
version: 0.1.0
appVersion: "1.0"

values:
  replicaCount: 1

  image:
    repository: my-web-app
    tag: latest
    pullPolicy: IfNotPresent

  service:
    type: ClusterIP
    port: 80

  database:
    username: admin
    password: DefaultPass123

  resources: {}
  
  nodeSelector: {}
  
  tolerations: []
  
  affinity: {}

templates:
  deployment.yaml:
    apiVersion: apps/v1
    kind: Deployment
    metadata:
      name: {{ .Release.Name }}-web-app
      labels:
        app: {{ .Release.Name }}-web-app
    spec:
      replicas: {{ .Values.replicaCount }}
      selector:
        matchLabels:
          app: {{ .Release.Name }}-web-app
      template:
        metadata:
          labels:
            app: {{ .Release.Name }}-web-app
        spec:
          containers:
            - name: web-app
              image: "{{ .Values.image.repository }}:{{ .Values.image.tag }}"
              ports:
                - containerPort: 80
              env:
                - name: DB_USERNAME
                  value: {{ .Values.database.username | quote }}
                - name: DB_PASSWORD
                  value: {{ .Values.database.password | quote }}

  service.yaml:
    apiVersion: v1
    kind: Service
    metadata:
      name: {{ .Release.Name }}-web-app
    spec:
      type: {{ .Values.service.type }}
      ports:
        - port: {{ .Values.service.port }}
          targetPort: 80
      selector:
        app: {{ .Release.Name }}-web-app
